metadata.title: Mai Tantance Bambancin Launuka Kyauta – Bin Doka WCAG 2.1
metadata.description: Duba ko launukan rubutu da bayan ka suna iya karatu bisa WCAG 2.1. Shigar da lambobin HEX, RGB ko HSL, duba ma'aunin bambanci kuma yi amfani da gyara ta.

hero.title: Mai tantance bambancin launuka da iya karatu
hero.description: Shigar da launin rubutu da baya, kayan aikin zai nuna ko bambanci ya isa. Ana yin ƙididdiga bisa ka'idar samun dama ta duniya WCAG 2.1, wanda ke ayyana ƙananan ƙimomin bambanci don nau'ikan abun ciki daban-daban.

software.name: Mai tantance bambancin launuka da iya karatu ta yanar gizo
alternateName: Mai gwada iya karatu na launuka
Mai tantance bambancin rubutu da baya
Mai tantance samun dama na launuka
Shin launuka na suna iya karatu
software.description: Duba ko launukan rubutu da baya suna iya karatu ga duk masu amfani. Kayan aikin yana ƙididdige ma'aunin bambanci bisa WCAG 2.1 kuma yana nuna ko kana cika buƙatun samun dama.
featureList: Tantance bin doka WCAG 2.1 Matsayi AA
Tantance bin doka WCAG 2.1 Matsayi AAA
Gwada alamomin hoto da bangarorin UI
Tallafawa tsarin launuka na RGB da RGBA
Tallafawa tsarin launuka na HSL da HSLA
Mai zaɓar launi don zaɓi ta gani
Sarrafa a cikin browser na gida

howTo.name: Yadda ake tantance bambancin launuka da iya karatu ta yanar gizo
howTo.description: Yadda ake tantance iya karatu na launukan rubutu da baya bisa ka'idar WCAG. Shigar da launuka, karanta ma'aunin bambanci, kuma yi amfani da fasalin daidaitawa ta atomatik.

steps.name: Zaɓi launin rubutu
steps.text: Shigar da lambar launi (misali, #333333) a tsarin HEX, RGB, ko HSL - ko zaɓi launi daga mai zaɓar launi.

steps.name: Zaɓi launin baya
steps.text: Shigar da launin baya da za a nuna rubutu a kai - wannan na iya zama launin baya na sashe, toshe, ko shafi.

steps.name: Karanta sakamakon
steps.text: Kayan aikin zai nuna ma'aunin bambanci da kuma ko launuka sun cika buƙatun AA/AAA.

steps.name: Daidaita launuka
steps.text: Idan bambanci ya yi ƙasa, fasalin Daidaitawa yana ba da shawarar bambance-bambancen launin rubutu ta atomatik da ke cika ƙofar WCAG da aka zaɓa.

contentBlocks.title: Me ya sa iya karatu na launuka ke da muhimmanci?
contentBlocks.html:
Iya karatu shi ne bambancin haske tsakanin launin rubutu da launin baya. Gwargwadon bambancin da ke akwai, haka sauƙin karanta rubutu yake. Bambanci mai ƙasa yana sa abun ciki ya yi wuya a karanta - musamman ga mutane masu matsalar gani, tsofaffi, ko a cikin yanayin haske mai wahala (misali, a kan waya a cikin hasken rana kai tsaye).

Bisa ga Hukumar Lafiya ta Duniya (WHO), kusan mutane biliyan 2.2 a duk duniya suna da wani nau'in matsalar gani. Bugu da ƙari, miliyoyin suna da matsalar ganin launi (kusan 8% na maza da 0.5% na mata), da yawa kuma suna fuskantar raguwar gani saboda tsufa.

Kayan aikin yana ƙididdige ma'aunin bambanci ta amfani da dabarar da aka ayyana a cikin WCAG 2.1 (Web Content Accessibility Guidelines) - jagororin samun dama na dijital na duniya. Sakamakon yana ba da damar tantancewa ta haƙiƙa ko launuka suna iya karatu isa, ba tare da la'akari da saitunan na'ura ko fahimtar launi ta mutum ba.

contentBlocks.title: Yadda ake amfani da mai tantance bambancin launuka
contentBlocks.description: Tantance iya karatu yana ɗaukar 'yan daƙiƙu kaɗan kawai:

items.title: 1. Shigar da launin rubutu
items.description: Buga lambar launi (misali, #333333) a tsarin HEX, RGB, ko HSL - ko zaɓi launi daga mai zaɓar launi.

items.title: 2. Shigar da launin baya
items.description: Shigar da launin baya da za a nuna rubutu a kai - wannan na iya zama bayan sashe, toshe, ko cikakken shafi.

items.title: 3. Karanta sakamakon
items.description: Kayan aikin zai ƙididdige ma'aunin bambanci kuma ya nuna ko launuka sun cika buƙatun WCAG don rubutu na al'ada, rubutu babba, da alamomin hoto.

items.title: 4. Daidaita launuka
items.description: Idan bambanci ya yi ƙasa, fasalin Daidaitawa yana ba da shawarar bambancen launi ta atomatik da ke cika ƙofar da aka zaɓa.

contentBlocks.title: Wane irin tsarin launuka ake tallafawa?

tabs.title: HEX
tabs.html:
Tsarin hexadecimal - mafi yawan amfani a cikin ƙirar yanar gizo. Yana farawa da # kuma ya ƙunshi haruffa 3 ko 6 (lambobi 0-9 da haruffa A-F).

  • #fff - fari (gajeriyar siga)
  • #ffffff - fari (cikakkiyar siga)
  • #1a73e8 - shuɗi

tabs.title: RGB / RGBA
tabs.html:
Tsari bisa tashoshi uku: Ja, Kore, Shuɗi. Kowane tashar yana karɓar ƙima daga 0 zuwa 255. Bambancin RGBA yana ƙara sigar huɗu - gaskiya (alpha) daga 0 zuwa 1.

  • rgb(255, 255, 255) - fari
  • rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.8) - baƙi a 80% gaskiya

tabs.title: HSL / HSLA
tabs.html:
Tsari bisa Hue (0-360°), Saturation (0-100%), da Lightness (0-100%). Bambancin HSLA yana ƙara gaskiya. Wannan tsari yana da amfani lokacin da kake son daidaita haske ko ƙarfin launi.

  • hsl(0, 0%, 100%) - fari
  • hsla(217, 91%, 60%, 0.9) - shuɗi a 90% gaskiya

contentBlocks.title: Yadda ake fassara sakamakon gwajin iya karatu
contentBlocks.demoHtml:
Ma'aunin bambanci

8.59:1

Rubutu na al'ada

AA (min. 4.5:1)AAA (min. 7:1)

Misalin rubutu na al'ada

Rubutu babba

AA (min. 3:1)AAA (min. 4.5:1)
contentBlocks.html:
Bayan shigar da launuka, kayan aikin yana nuna sakamako a cikin sassa uku:

  • Rubutu na al'ada - yana buƙatar bambanci 4.5:1 (AA) ko 7:1 (AAA). Yana shafi rubutu ƙasa da 18pt (24px) ko ƙasa da 14pt mai kauri.
  • Rubutu babba / mai kauri - yana buƙatar bambanci 3:1 (AA) ko 4.5:1 (AAA). Yana shafi taken, maɓallai, da haskakawa.
  • Alamomin hoto - yana buƙatar bambanci 3:1 (AA). Yana shafi alamomin hoto da abubuwan zane na UI da ke isar da bayanai.

Alamar kore tana nufin an cika buƙatar. Alamar ja tana nufin bambanci ya yi ƙasa kuma yana buƙatar ingantawa.

contentBlocks.title: Menene ma'anar sakamakon gwajin iya karatu?
contentBlocks.html:
Kayan aikin yana nuna ma'aunin bambanci a kan ma'auni daga 1:1 (babu bambanci) zuwa 21:1 (mafi girman bambanci - baƙi a kan fari). Ana kwatanta sakamakon da ƙofofin da aka ayyana a cikin ka'idar WCAG:

  • Rubutu na al'ada - yana buƙatar aƙalla 4.5:1 don Matsayi AA (ƙaramin ka'ida) ko 7:1 don Matsayi AAA (ingantaccen ka'ida). Yana shafi rubutu ƙasa da 18pt (24px) ko ƙasa da 14pt (18.5px) mai kauri.
  • Rubutu babba / mai kauri - yana buƙatar aƙalla 3:1 don Matsayi AA ko 4.5:1 don Matsayi AAA. Yana shafi rubutu daga 18pt (24px) ko daga 14pt (18.5px) mai kauri - taken, maɓallai, haskakawa.
  • Alamomin hoto da abubuwan UI - suna buƙatar aƙalla 3:1 don Matsayi AA. Yana shafi alamomin hoto, maɓallai, filayen fom, da sauran abubuwan mu'amala da ke isar da bayanai.

Matsayi AA shi ne mafi ƙarancin da ake buƙata ta dokokin samun dama na dijital a ƙasashe da yawa, ciki har da Dokar Samun Dama ta Yanar Gizo ta EU. Matsayi AAA yana ba da iya karatu mafi kyau amma ba koyaushe ne zai yiwu a cimma ga dukan abubuwa ba.

contentBlocks.title: Daidaita launi ta atomatik zuwa buƙatun WCAG
contentBlocks.html:
Idan bambanci ya yi ƙasa, ba ka buƙatar neman launin da ya dace ta hanyar gwaji da kuskure. Fasalin Daidaitawa yana neman bambancen launin rubutu ta atomatik da ke cika ƙofar bambanci da aka zaɓa.

Yadda daidaitawa ke aiki:

  1. Zaɓi manufar daidaitawa daga jerin - misali, AA don rubutu na al'ada ko AAA don rubutu babba.
  2. Danna maɓallin Daidaitawa.
  3. Kayan aikin zai bincika ta hanyar bambance-bambancen haske na launin rubutu ya kuma ba da shawarar mafi kusa da ya cika buƙatun.
  4. Ana iya kwafa launin da aka ba da shawara zuwa clipboard ko a saita shi nan da nan a matsayin sabon launin rubutu.

Algorithm ɗin yana kiyaye launin asali da ƙarfin launi, yana canza haske kawai. Launin da aka ba da shawara yana ci gaba da daidaituwa da asalin gani yayin da yake cika ka'idar samun dama.

contentBlocks.title: Menene ma'anar matakan AA da AAA a cikin ka'idar WCAG?

features.name: Alamomin hoto da abubuwan UI - min. 3:1
Ana ba da shawara don abun ciki na muhimmanci

contentBlocks.title: Warware matsaloli da mai tantance bambancin launuka
contentBlocks.html:
Na ga sakon kuskuren tsarin launi

Duba tsarin launin. Lambar HEX yakamata ta fara da # kuma ta ƙunshi haruffa 3 ko 6 (misali #fff ko #ffffff). Don RGB, tabbatar cewa dabi'u sun rabu da waƙafi kuma suna cikin kewayon 0-255.

Aikin Daidaitawa bai sami dacen launi ba

Lokacin da bango da rubutu suna da irin wannan haske a cikin launi ɗaya, algorithm ɗin na iya rashin samun sigar da ta cika buƙatun ba tare da canza launin ba. A wannan yanayin, yi la'akari da canza launin bango ko zaɓar wani launin rubutu dabam.

Mai zaɓen launi bai dace da lambar da aka shigar ba

Mai zaɓen launin na'ura mai bincike yana tallafawa tsarin HEX kawai ba tare da gaskiya ba. Idan ka shigar da launi a cikin tsarin RGBA ko HSLA tare da gaskiya, mai zaɓen zai nuna ɓangaren launi kawai (ba tare da alfa ba). Ƙididdiga na bambanci har yanzu suna la'akari da gaskiyar.

contentBlocks.title: Ina ya kamata a tantance iya karatu na launuka?
contentBlocks.description: Iya karatu yana da muhimmanci a ko'ina da wani ke buƙatar karanta rubutu ko gane wani abu na UI:

items.title: Gidajen yanar gizo
items.description: Rubutu a kan shafuka, maɓallai, hanyoyin haɗi, fom. Yana da muhimmanci musamman don shafukan kasuwanci inda masu ziyara suke da shekaru da ikon gani daban-daban.

items.title: Shagunan yanar gizo
items.description: Farashin, maɓallin Saya Yanzu, bayanan kaya. Ƙarancin iya karatu na iya nufin asarar oda.

items.title: Gabatarwa
items.description: Faifai da ake nunawa ta hanyar projector galibi suna da bambanci mai rauni fiye da na na'ura. Duba launuka kafin gabatarwa.

items.title: Fastoci da takardun talla
items.description: Kayan bugu da ake kallon su a cikin yanayin haske daban-daban suna buƙatar bambanci mai girma.

items.title: Aikace-aikacen waya
items.description: Ana amfani da wayoyin hannu a cikin hasken rana mai ƙarfi, da dare, kuma mutane masu shekaru daban-daban ne ke amfani da su.

items.title: Menu na gidajen abinci
items.description: Galibi ana buga su a kan takarda mai launi ko tare da haruffan ado - sauƙi a ƙare da bambanci mai ƙasa sosai.

contentBlocks.title: Iya karatu na launuka ga masu matsalar ganin launi
contentBlocks.html:
Matsalar ganin launi tana shafar kusan 8% na maza da 0.5% na mata. Mutane masu matsalar ganin launi na iya samun wahalar bambanta wasu nau'ikan launuka biyu, ko da bambancin haske ya isa.

Nau'ikan matsalar ganin launi mafi yawa:

  • Deuteranopia - wahalar bambanta kore da ja (nau'in da ya fi yawa)
  • Protanopia - wahalar ganin ja
  • Tritanopia - wahalar ganin shuɗi da rawaya (da wuya)

Wannan kayan aikin yana tantance bambancin haske, wanda ke da muhimmanci ga duk masu amfani. Duk da haka, lokacin ƙira, yana da kyau a guje wa haɗuwar launuka masu matsala (misali, rubutu ja a kan bayan kore) kuma kada a dogara da launi kawai don isar da bayanai - yi amfani da siffofi, alamomin hoto, da rubutu ma.

contentBlocks.title: Menene ke sa wannan mai tantance bambanci da iya karatu ya bambanta?

items.title: Tantancewa ta haƙiƙa bisa dabarar lissafi
items.description: Ana ƙididdige ma'aunin bambanci ta amfani da dabarar WCAG - sakamakon bai dogara da saitunan na'ura ko fahimtar launi ta mutum ba.

items.title: Bin doka da ka'idar WCAG ta duniya
items.description: Sakamako sun dace da buƙatun WCAG 2.1, waɗanda suke tushen dokokin samun dama na dijital a EU da ƙasashe da yawa.

items.title: Daidaita launi ta atomatik zuwa ƙofar
items.description: Fasalin Daidaitawa yana neman bambancen launin rubutu da ke cika ƙofar bambanci da aka zaɓa - yana kiyaye launi, yana canza haske kawai.

items.title: Tsarin launuka biyar
items.description: Tsare-tsare da ake tallafawa: HEX, RGB, RGBA, HSL, da HSLA. Ana iya liƙa lambar launi kai tsaye daga Figma, Photoshop, ko takardun salon CSS.

items.title: Nau'ikan abun ciki uku a cikin gwaji ɗaya
items.description: Tantancewa guda ɗaya tana nuna sakamakon rubutu na al'ada, rubutu babba (taken, maɓallai), da alamomin hoto - ba buƙatar gwada kowane nau'i dabam.

contentBlocks.title: Tambayoyin da ake yawan yi game da mai tantance bambancin launuka

items.question: Menene ma'aunin bambancin launuka?
items.answer: Ma'aunin bambanci shi ne ma'aunin bambancin haske tsakanin launuka biyu. Ma'aunin yana farawa daga 1:1 (babu bambanci - misali, rubutu fari a kan bayan fari) zuwa 21:1 (mafi girman bambanci - rubutu baƙi a kan bayan fari). Gwargwadon ma'aunin da ke girma, haka sauƙin bambanta rubutu daga baya yake.

items.question: Wane bambanci ne ya isa bisa WCAG?
items.answer: Don rubutu na al'ada, mafi ƙarancin shi ne 4.5:1 (Matsayi AA). Don rubutu babba - taken daga 18pt ko rubutu mai kauri daga 14pt - 3:1 ya isa. Don alamomin hoto da bangarorin UI, ana buƙatar 3:1 ma. Waɗannan ƙofofin suna tabbatar da iya karatu ga yawancin masu amfani, ciki har da masu matsalar gani.

items.question: Shin bambancin launuka yana da muhimmanci ga masu matsalar ganin launi?
items.answer: Mai tantance yana gwada bambancin haske, wanda ke da muhimmanci ga duk masu amfani, ciki har da masu matsalar ganin launi. Duk da haka, matsalar ganin launi matsala ce ta fahimtar launi, ba ta haske ba - don haka ban da bambanci, guje wa haɗuwar launuka masu matsala (misali, rubutu ja a kan bayan kore) kuma kada ka dogara da launi kawai don isar da bayanai.

items.question: Me ya sa launi na ba ya cika buƙatun duk da cewa na iya ganinsa daidai?
items.answer: Fahimtar launi ta mutum ya dogara da saitunan na'ura, hasken ɗaki, da ikon gani na mutum. WCAG ya dogara ne akan dabarar lissafi ta haƙiƙa da ke la'akari da matsalolin gani daban-daban. Launi da ake iya karanta a kan allon guda ɗaya na iya zama ba a iya karanta a kan wani ko ga wani mutum.

items.question: Ina buƙatar cika matakin bambanci na AAA?
items.answer: Ba koyaushe ba. Matsayi AA (4.5:1 don rubutu na al'ada) shi ne mafi ƙarancin da ake buƙata ta dokokin samun dama a Tarayyar Turai. Matsayi AAA (7:1) yana ba da iya karatu mafi kyau amma ya fi wahala a cimma. Don abun ciki mai muhimmanci - gargaɗi, umarnin tsaro - yi la'akari da nufin AAA.

items.question: Menene ka'idar WCAG?
items.answer: WCAG (Web Content Accessibility Guidelines) tarin jagororin samun dama na yanar gizo ne na duniya da ƙungiyar W3C ta ƙera. Yana ayyana, a tsakanin sauran abubuwa, ƙananan ƙimomin bambancin launuka, tsarin taken, tallafin maɓallin keyboard, da sauran buƙatun da ke sa gidajen yanar gizo su samu ga mutane masu nakasa daban-daban.

items.question: Ina zan sami lambobin launuka daga gidan yanar gizon na?
items.answer: A cikin browser (Chrome, Firefox, Edge) za ka iya buɗe kayan aikin mai haɓakawa (danna dama > Inspect). A cikin shafin Styles, za ka iya ganin launukan da ake amfani da su a kan shafin. Ko kuma ƙarin na'urorin browser kamar ColorZilla suna baka damar zaɓar launin kowane abu ba tare da shiga cikin lambar ba.

items.question: Wane nau'ikan launuka biyu a kan shafin na ya kamata in tantance da farko?
items.answer: Mafi muhimmanci: rubutu a kan babban baya, rubutu a kan tutoci da sassa masu launi, maɓallai (launin rubutu da bayan maɓalli dangane da bayan shafi), hanyoyin haɗi, da alamomin hoto. Ka mai da hankali musamman ga abubuwan da ke bayyana a kan bayan daban-daban gwargwadon sashe.
